Problem.description: RFC 9457 problem+json. `context` varies by error category.

info.description: Read-only query service over predefined ClickHouse metrics. Admins define metrics (named SQL queries) in MariaDB; the frontend queries them by UUID with OData-style filtering. The API Gateway mounts this service at /api/analytics.
info.title: Analytics API

get.summary: Get an admin metric threshold by id

post.summary: Read the metric catalog for the request context

get.summary: List queryable columns for a table

post.summary: Create a threshold for a metric
